parameters.jsCode:
const body = $('Webhook').first().json.body || {};
const target = body.target || body.agency || body.query || 'SOCOM';

const GDA_SCOPE = 'training simulation XR virtual reality digital readiness C5ISR cyber intelligence SIGINT logistics defense technology';
const GDA_NAICS = 'NAICS 541511 541512 541513 611430 541990 541715 336414';

const s1 = `"${target}" organization leadership biography commander director 2026`;
const s2 = `"${target}" contract awards ${GDA_SCOPE} top vendors spending budget FY2025 FY2026 (site:usaspending.gov OR site:defense.gov OR site:sam.gov)`;
const s3 = `"${target}" IDIQ vehicles contract types set-aside small business ${GDA_SCOPE} programs 2025 2026`;
const s4 = `"${target}" active contracts awards $50M $100M awardee training simulation technology readiness 2025 2026`;
const s5 = `USASpending.gov "${target}" top vendors recipients awards FY2025 training simulation technology`;
const s6 = `"${target}" FY2026 budget justification president budget request contract recompete`;
const s7 = `"${target}" organizational chart command structure leadership hierarchy deputy director`;

const prompt = [
  `Conduct a full agency intelligence analysis on TARGET: ${target}.`,
  `SCOPE RESTRICTION: Focus ONLY on contracts and spending related to: ${GDA_SCOPE}. Relevant NAICS codes: ${GDA_NAICS}. Ignore unrelated procurement categories.`,
  '',
  'Execute these 8 steps IN ORDER:',
  `1. ORG & LEADERSHIP  - Search Tavily: "${s1}"`,
  `2. SPEND & VENDORS   - Search USASpending Spend Data with keywords: "${target} training simulation" — Get real award data`,
  `3. VEHICLES & HOW    - Search Tavily: "${s3}"`,
  `4. ACTIVE CONTRACTS  - Search Tavily: "${s4}"`,
  `5. VENDOR LOOKUP     - Search Tavily: "${s5}" — Find top 3 incumbent vendors by dollar value`,
  `6. BUDGET & RECOMPETE- Search Tavily: "${s6}" — Find FY2026 PB figures and upcoming recompete windows`,
  `7. LIVE OPPS         - Search SAM.gov with keyword: "${target}" (filter to relevant NAICS if possible)`,
  `8. ORG CHART         - Search Tavily: "${s7}" — Find command structure, key offices, reporting hierarchy`,
  '',
  'CRITICAL REQUIREMENTS:',
  '- Include at least 3 real contract numbers (e.g., W912CL-23-D-0004) with actual award values',
  '- For each top incumbent vendor, include their largest contract value and description',
  '- HEAD-TO-HEAD: Compare EIS capabilities (XR/simulation, C5ISR, cyber/SIGINT) vs top 3 incumbents with specific capability gaps',
  '- Every dollar figure MUST cite source: [USASpending FY2025], [Tavily: URL], or [ESTIMATED]',
  '- ORG CHART: Build a hierarchical command structure with names, titles, and reporting relationships',
  '',
  'Return ONLY this JSON (no markdown, no extra text):',
  '{',
  `  "target": "${target}",`,
  '  "who_are_they": "2-3 sentence org overview: mission, structure, size, primary location",',
  '  "who_leads_them": [{"name":"","title":"","background":"1-2 sentence bio"}],',
  '  "org_chart": {"commander":{"name":"","title":""},"direct_reports":[{"name":"","title":"","office":""}],"key_offices":[{"name":"","mission":"","head":""}],"source":"URL or reference"},',
  '  "how_much_spend": {"fy2025_total":"$ [source]","fy2024_total":"$ [source]","fy2026_pb_request":"$ [source]","trend":"up/down/flat","yoy_change":"","notes":""},',
  '  "who_buying_from": [{"rank":1,"vendor":"","award_total":"$ [source]","contract_number":"","category":"","incumbent_programs":[],"eis_comparison":"How EIS compares to this vendor"}],',
  '  "how_they_buy": {"dominant_contract_type":"","avg_award_size":"","sole_source_pct":"","competition_pct":"","notes":""},',
  '  "where_they_spend": {"primary_locations":[],"major_installations":[],"conus_pct":"","oconus_pct":""},',
  '  "what_vehicles": [{"name":"","ceiling":"","expiry":"","contract_number":"","open_to_new_entrants":true,"small_bus_reserved":false}],',
  '  "what_they_buy": {"top_naics":[{"code":"","description":"","pct":""}],"top_psc":[],"primary_mission_areas":[]},',
  '  "set_asides": {"small_business_pct":"","sdvosb_pct":"","wosb_pct":"","8a_pct":"","hubzone_pct":"","unrestricted_pct":""},',
  '  "big_contracts": [{"title":"","awardee":"","value":"$ [source]","contract_number":"","award_date":"","period":"","naics":"","recompete_date":""}],',
  '  "mid_contracts": [{"title":"","awardee":"","value":"$ [source]","contract_number":"","award_date":"","period":"","naics":"","recompete_date":""}],',
  '  "head_to_head": [{"competitor":"Top Incumbent 1","strengths":[""],"weaknesses":[""],"eis_advantages":["EIS capabilities that beat them"],"eis_gaps":["Where EIS falls short"],"verdict":"Win/Lose/Toss-up"},{"competitor":"Top Incumbent 2","strengths":[""],"weaknesses":[""],"eis_advantages":[""],"eis_gaps":[""],"verdict":""},{"competitor":"Top Incumbent 3","strengths":[""],"weaknesses":[""],"eis_advantages":[""],"eis_gaps":[""],"verdict":""}],',
  '  "eis_opportunities": {"overall_fit":"High/Medium/Low","rationale":"","target_programs":[],"recommended_vehicles":[],"teaming_suggestions":[],"capture_priority":"","doge_risk":"","pwin_estimate":"Low/Medium/High with rationale"},',
  '  "data_sources": [{"name":"","url":"","accessed":"","data_type":""}],',
  '  "generated_at": "ISO timestamp"',
  '}'
].join('\n');

return [{ json: { prompt, target } }];

parameters.query: INSERT INTO intelligence_log (workflow_name, session_id, target, summary, generated_at) VALUES ('Competitive Intel', $1, $2, $3, NOW())
SELECT target, full_11q_result, created_at FROM gda_competitor_cache WHERE target != 'socom' ORDER BY target ASC

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 8000, system: 'You are an agency intelligence analyst for Georgetown Defense Analytics (GDA). CEO: Alexander Johnson (AJ). Return ONLY valid JSON. No markdown fences.', messages: [{role: 'user', content: $json.prompt}]}) }}
